# fluxLab.dev

> Kyiv-based software development studio building production SaaS products.

## About

fluxLab.dev is a software development studio based in Kyiv, Ukraine. We build, ship, and scale SaaS products. We have multiple production products serving 46,000+ users across 800+ companies.

## Products

- [EFluxCom](https://efluxcom.com): Smart energy management platform for monitoring and optimizing power consumption. 12,400 users, 85 companies. Tech: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS.
- [WashFlow](https://washflow.app): All-in-one laundry business management suite with order tracking, route optimization, and customer portal. 8,700 users, 120 companies. Tech: React, Next.js, TypeScript, NestJS, PostgreSQL, React Native.
- [Accounting](https://flux-lab.dev/en/projects/accounting): Modern financial management platform for SMBs in Ukraine and Eastern Europe. Automated invoicing, expense tracking, VAT calculations, 1C/BAS export. 6,200 users, 340 companies.
- [Jobber](https://jobber.fluxlab.dev): AI-powered job application tracker with resume builder, cover letter generation, job import via Chrome extension, and recruitment analytics. Built with Go, Next.js, PostgreSQL, Claude AI. 15,300 users.
- [Market](https://flux-lab.dev/en/projects/market): Multi-vendor e-commerce marketplace platform with split payments, Elasticsearch, and seller management. Beta.
- [LifeSpan](https://flux-lab.dev/en/projects/lifespan): Health and wellness tracking mobile app. Coming soon.

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, React Native
- Backend: Go, Node.js, NestJS
- Databases: PostgreSQL, Redis
- DevOps: Docker, Hetzner Cloud, GitHub Actions, Terraform
- AI: Claude API (Anthropic)
- Payments: Paddle, Stripe, LiqPay

## Team

Small, senior team based in Kyiv, Ukraine. 3+ years of experience building production SaaS products together.

## Contact

- Website: https://flux-lab.dev
- Email: hello@fluxlab.dev
- Location: Kyiv, Ukraine
- GitHub: https://github.com/fluxlab

## Blog

Technical blog covering Go backend development, React performance, PostgreSQL optimization, Docker deployment, AI integration, multi-language apps, and SaaS product building.

Blog URL: https://flux-lab.dev/en/blog
